title: Gulf leaders meet in Saudi Arabia for first time since start of war on Iran
snippet: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman chaired a consultative GCC meeting in Jeddah — first in-person since war began Feb 28. Qatar's emir, Kuwait's crown prince, Bahrain's king and UAE's foreign minister attended. Discussed response to thousands of Iranian missile/drone attacks on GCC states. Attacks have subsided since April 8 ceasefire but Gulf capitals remain wary. UAE's Gargash (separately) slammed GCC political/military response as 'weakest in history'.
tag_reason: GCC 정상회의는 신규 사건. 이전 7일 소스에 동일 항목 없음.
